name: Batrider
description: It's not the bat you gotta worry about. She eats fruit.

abilities.name: Smoldering Resin
abilities.description: Attacks apply a resin that deals a portion of Batrider's attack damage as damage per second.

abilities.name: Sticky Napalm
abilities.description: Damage instances sourced from the Batrider procs additional damage corresponding to the amount of applied stacks.

abilities.name: Flamebreak
abilities.description: Hurls an explosive cocktail that explodes when it reaches the target location and deals damage over time to enemy units in the area. Applies Sticky Napalm to its corresponding level upon Flamebreak impact.

abilities.name: Firefly
abilities.description: Creates a fire trail that damages any enemy units upon contact and destroys trees below Batrider.

abilities.name: Flaming Lasso
abilities.description: Lassoes an enemy unit, disables and drags them in Batrider's wake. Successful teleport sources applied to either Batrider or the debuff-affected enemy unit break the lasso.
